_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v12: NO think chains. liars_dice rebalanced (5000→3351, call-first 41.7%→13%). goofspiel 2000, leduc 2000, liars 3351, gin 604, hex 2106, othello 1321, clobber 5193. HF synced.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-27: v12 liars_dice fix (call-first 13%). gin_rummy needs more data+knock (604→1000+, 55.8%→95% knock games). leduc needs fold examples. HF synced.

NAVWORLD.notes: V8 generating. 4240 canonical (+70 food_tour/intercity/multiday). 3x30 more jobs running (multiday/intercity/hybrid). Target 5000+ for 19%+ training ratio.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-27: 4240 canonical. All new entries validated 100%. Quality audit: all entries ≥45 code score.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 1037 canonical (Go 1027, Rust 5, Ruby 4, JS 1). m2 TERMINATED. R2 pool ~3500+. HF synced. Blocked on compute.

LIVEWEB.notes: v20+HN. 10799 entries (9999 base + 800 HN diversity). HN: 4 templates x 200 seeds (news_summary, multi_condition_filter, extrema_comparison, category_comparison). All validated. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-27: 10799 entries. +800 HN diversity (4 templates). All pass validation. HF synced.
